goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { fs_from_list[T](k0) = s and k0.is_unique }
finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) = sum[A](map[T, A](items, f))
finite_set_sum[T, A](s, g) = sum[A](map[T, A](items, g))

proof: function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ fs_from_list[T0](x0) = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](items, x)
function(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ s or g(x0) = f(x0) }(x)

goal: sum[A](map[T, A](items, f)) = sum[A](map[T, A](items, g))
proof: let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ items and f(w0) != g(w0) }
function(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ items or g(x0) = f(x0) }(w0)

goal: finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](s, g)

proof: let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ s and f(w0) != g(w0) }
function(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ s or g(x0) = f(x0) }(w0)

goal: finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](s, g)
finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) + finite_set_sum[T, A](s, g) = finite_set_sum[T, A](s, add_fn[T, A](f, g))
finite_set_sum[T, A](fs_insert(s, item), f) = f(item) + finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f)
f(item) + finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) + f(item)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](f(item), finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f))

goal: finite_set_sum[T, A](fs_insert(s, item), f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](s, f) + f(item)
finite_set_sum[T, A](fs_union[T](a, b), f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](a, f) + finite_set_sum[T, A](b, f)
finite_set_sum[T, A](a, f) + finite_set_sum[T, A](b, f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](b, f) + finite_set_sum[T, A](a, f)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](finite_set_sum[T, A](b, f), finite_set_sum[T, A](a, f))

goal: finite_set_sum[T, A](fs_union[T](a, b), f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](b, f) + finite_set_sum[T, A](a, f)
c * finite_set_sum[T, S](s, f) = finite_set_sum[T, S](s, mul_fn[T, S](c, f))

proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x0.second) = x0 }[T, U](p)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0]) { x0 ⊆ x0 }[U](b)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0]) { x0 ⊆ x0 }[T](a)

goal: finite_set_sum[Pair[T, U], A](finite_set_product[T, U](a, b), f) = finite_set_sum[T, A](a, function(x0: T) { finite_set_sum[U, A](b, function(x1: U) { f(Pair.new(x0, x1)) }) })

proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T1] -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { x0(Pair.new[T0, T1](x1, x2)) = finite_set_product_row_fn[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[T, U, A](f, x, y)
let w0: T satisfy { not Real.0 <= f(w0) }
function(x0: T) { Real.0 <= f(x0) }(w0)
let w0: T satisfy { not Real.0 <= f(w0) }
function(x0: T) { Real.0 <= f(x0) }(w0)

goal: finite_set_sum[T, Real](s, f) <= finite_set_sum[T, Real](s, g)
pointwise_le[T](f, g) = forall(x0: T) { f(x0) <= g(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0 -> Real) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x2) <= x1(x2) } = pointwise_le[T0](x0, x1) }[T](f, g)
let w0: T satisfy { not f(w0) <= g(w0) }
function(x0: T) { f(x0) <= g(x0) }(w0)

goal: pointwise_le[T](f, g) = forall(x0: T) { f(x0) <= g(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0 -> Real) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x2) <= x1(x2) } = pointwise_le[T0](x0, x1) }[T](f, g)
let w0: T satisfy { not f(w0) <= g(w0) }
function(x0: T) { f(x0) <= g(x0) }(w0)

goal: pointwise_le[T](f, g) = forall(x0: T) { f(x0) <= g(x0) }
